name: Chocolate Sophisticate
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a heavy saucepan over very low heat.
2. Add instant coffee and stir until dissolved.
3. Soften the gelatine in 1 tablespoon of water.
4. Combine sugar, salt, and water; bring to boil for 1 minute, then cool to lukewarm.
5. Stir in the melted chocolate, vanilla, and softened gelatine.
6. Beat egg yolks until very thick and lemon-colored (at least 5 minutes).
7. Blend yolk mixture into the chocolate mixture.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the chocolate mixture.
9. Lay split ladyfingers or spongecake strips in the bottom of a well-oiled 9-inch by 5-inch by 3-inch loaf pan.
10. Spoon about 1 cup of chocolate mixture into the pan.
11. Line the sides of the pan with split ladyfingers or spongecake strips, anchoring the ends in the filling.
12. Fill the mold with alternating layers of chocolate filling and ladyfingers, ending with ladyfingers.
13. Chill for at least 24 hours.
14. Unmold on a chilled plate.
15. Serve immediately. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
